title: init_swtpm shared between wolftpm and wolftpm-tss is the right design
description: The setenv/init/unsetenv sequence for swtpm lives in wolftpm-sys::swtpm::init_swtpm and is used by both wolftpm::Device::open_swtpm and wolftpm_tss::WolfTpmSwtpm::connect. This is correct: there is exactly one implementation of a delicate env-var dance that carries real thread-safety risk. A future contributor might inline it to avoid the cross-crate dependency; resist that — duplication here guarantees divergence.
